# The Preditorium Prophecy

Official website: https://preditorium.com/

The Preditorium Prophecy: The Golden Statue is a middle-grade fantasy adventure by Praanav J Thaakur, a 13-year-old Indian author.

Core facts:
- Full title: The Preditorium Prophecy: The Golden Statue
- Author: Praanav J Thaakur
- Genre: Middle-grade fantasy adventure
- Audience: Readers aged 13 to 18
- Publisher: Notion Press
- Publication date: 2026-06-05
- ISBN-13: 979-8904518042
- Length: 21 chapters, 183 pages

Short description:
Six friends discover strange powers, ancient secrets, hidden tunnels and a prophecy that pulls them into a race against darkness beneath the Preditorium.

Useful pages:
- Official book page: https://preditorium.com/
- Free Chapter 1 sample: https://preditorium.com/sample-chapter.pdf
- Buy on Amazon India: https://www.amazon.in/dp/B0H461JZXX
- Buy from Notion Press: https://notionpress.com/read/the-preditorium-prophecy

Contact:
For school sessions, media enquiries or author-related questions, contact thakur.jai@gmail.com. The account is managed by Praanav's parent/guardian.
